name: ejentum-mcp
description: Reasoning Harness for agentic AI. Four MCP tools (reasoning, code, anti-deception, memory) over a library of 679 cognitive operations engineered in two layers: a natural-language procedure plus an executable reasoning topology (graph DAG with gates, parallel branches, and meta-cognitive exits). Two install paths: stdio via `npx -y ejentum-mcp`, or hosted HTTPS at https://api.ejentum.com/mcp (Bearer auth via EJENTUM_API_KEY).
long_description: Four MCP tools (harness_reasoning, harness_code, harness_anti_deception, harness_memory) wrap the Ejentum Logic API, which retrieves a task-matched cognitive operation from a library of 679. Reasoning (311 ops) spans six domains: abstraction, time, causality, simulation, spatial, metacognition. Code (128 ops) covers the software-engineering layer. Anti-Deception (139 ops) spans six sub-layers: sycophancy, hallucination, deception, adversarial framing, judgment, executive control. Memory (101 ops) covers the perception layer. Each operation is engineered in two layers: a natural-language procedure (named failure pattern, steps, suppression vectors, falsification test) and an executable reasoning topology (graph DAG with decision gates, parallel branches, and meta-cognitive exits where the model pauses to self-observe and re-enters). The calling LLM absorbs both layers before its first token. Two install paths: stdio (this package) via `npx -y ejentum-mcp` for Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, Codex CLI, Claude Code, Cline, Continue; or hosted HTTPS at https://api.ejentum.com/mcp for n8n MCP Client and any HTTP-MCP client (Authorization: Bearer EJENTUM_API_KEY, no install, no subprocess). Hardens reasoning against decay on complex tasks and long agent loops. Free tier 100 calls.

ejentum_api_key.title: Ejentum API Key
ejentum_api_key.description: Get one at https://ejentum.com/pricing (free tier: 100 calls). Stored locally; never sent anywhere except the Ejentum API.
